texto: Every man is enthusiastic at times. One man has enthusiasm for thirty minutes another man has it for thirty days. But it is the man who has it for thirty years who makes a success in life.
explicacao: Citação de Edward B. Butler sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Every man is enthusiastic at times. One man has enthusiasm for thirty minutes another man has it …” articula reflexao, enthusiasm, thirty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
